The '''C-73 Tracker starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Sublight Products Corporation]] that predated the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]].

==Characteristics==
The C-73 was relatively slow and unmaneuverable and was armed with a pair of wing-tipped [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

==History==
This fighter was one of the last designs of [[Sublight Products Corporation|Subpro Corporation]] before beginning a partnership with [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] for the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] project. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] employed these craft in the crisis leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial era]], it continued to see use, but in limited quantity. Even older than the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]], it was mostly considered an antique, with some units in the [[Imperial Stardrive Museum]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

It was used by the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] as part of the outdated [[Virgillian Free Alignment Starfleet]] in the [[Virgillian Civil War]],<ref name="Bakura Sourcebook" /> which occurred between [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]]<ref name="Virgillia 25 BBY">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|jediwatch/13228_1.html|Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost}} is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:2:28," which corresponds to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. The [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']] [[HoloNet News/Legends|news]] story also establishes that the Virgillian Civil War began two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior, thereby placing it in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].</ref> and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Virgillia 4 ABY">According to ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', the war ended just before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' dates to 4 ABY.</ref>

Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], it was only used by the [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]] of [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]] as part of the planetary defense force.<ref name="AIR" />
